authors.author: Rich Mullins
Rich Mullins
Unser Gott ist ein mächtiger Gott

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v3 v1 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: When I come into His presence I humble myself I lift up both my hands And I began to worship Him I worship Him

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When I come into His presence I humble myself Rememberin' what He's done For the victories, He's won So I'll praise Him I'll praise Him

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: For all He's done for me Redeemed and set me free And because just because He's God.
